programme.title: Firewalker
programme.desc: Two seasoned adventurers recruited by a seemingly psychic woman with a treasure map go on an adventure to recover a horde of gold belonging to an ancient being called the Firewalker

programme.title: American Flyers
programme.desc: Marcus takes his kid brother David with him for a physical test and a brain scan suspecting cerebral aneurysm like their dad died of They head off on bikes for the big Rockies bike race with Marcus Sarah driving the van

programme.title: The Gladiator
programme.desc: A homicidal maniac is on the loose in Los Angeles killing motorists at random with his death car After losing his brother Jeff to the twisted assassin known as Skull Rick Benton takes it upon himself to hunt down the reckless drivers that fill the streets at night Being a master mechanic Rick spends his time converting his pick-up truck into an armed and dangerous vehicle With speed to take on the fastest car and strength to make sure in a one-on-one situation he will be the only survivor The cops soon find out about the vigilante known only as the Gladiator and do all they can to catch him before his citizens arrests go one step too far

programme.title: Filler
programme.desc: Filler

programme.title: TBH 132
programme.desc: TBH 132

programme.title: Petticoat Junction
programme.desc: Uncle Joe spends Kates money to buy cases of a stinky men and womens cologne for a fast buck The money was for screens in the hotel to keep mosquitoes from repelling guests Kate hopes to unload the stock and stop losing guests

programme.title: Shaolin Super Dragon
programme.desc: Shaolin Super Dragon

programme.title: Invincible Super Chan
programme.desc: Invincible Super Chan

programme.title: Return of the Tiger
programme.desc: Return of the Tiger

programme.title: Snake In The Eagles Shadow
programme.desc: Snake In The Eagles Shadow

programme.title: The Bullwinkle
programme.desc: The Bullwinkle

programme.title: Bullwinkle 106
programme.desc: Bullwinkle 106

programme.title: Friday the 13th The Series
programme.desc: Micki and Ryan travel to a seaside village to retrieve a cursed foghorn that is being used by a town resident to summon the ghost of a vengeful pirate

programme.title: City of the Living Dead
programme.desc: A psychic and a journalist head to Dunvich to prevent an apocalypse after a priest commits suicide in a cemetery somehow causing the gates of hell to open and allowing the dead to rise

programme.title: Freddys Nightmares
programme.desc: A washed up newspaper editor is given the story of a lifetime However he soon finds out that the newspaper tells the future and sees an article about him committing suicide

programme.title: Tales from the Crypt
programme.desc: A life on the edge hot rodder named Billy comes to town run by Sheriff Garrett he immediately dates and romances his daughter with ulterior motives linked to Garretts past for which he was once a champion of the hot rodding Will Garrett accept Billys challenge to the death

programme.title: Tales from the Crypt
programme.desc: A mousy librarian over-react reports of a serial killer

programme.title: The Hitchhiker
programme.desc: Eager and unscrupulous tabloid newspaper reporter Jane L will go to any length to score a juicy scoop Jane L gets in way over her head when she goes snooping around a remote rural mansion in search of Billy Baltimore a legendary 60s acid rock guitarist who reportedly died twenty years ago

programme.title: The Hitchhiker
programme.desc: International hit woman Jackie Dresser makes a living traveling all over the world and bumping people off for a substantial fee Complications arise when the lonely and love-starved Jackie falls for hunky fitness instructor Johnnie while on vacation in a foreign country

programme.title: Werewolf
programme.desc: Eric meets a good witch in the woods who offers to cure him She gives a love potion to a girl whos boyfriend dies after taking it The boys dad blaming her shows up with his buddies and burns her house down with her in it

programme.title: Werewolf
programme.desc: Eric working in a Mom-and-Pop diner has to save the day when a gang of bikers show up to terrorize Mom Pop and a pretty customer Soups on werewolf style

programme.title: Knight 307
programme.desc: Knight 307

programme.title: Hogans Heroes
programme.desc: In order to steal enough explosives to blow up a difficult bridge Hogans men paint anti-Nazi graffiti on the camps ammo building

programme.title: Hogans Heroes
programme.desc: Hogan wants to get a peek at the documents that a visiting general has

programme.title: McHales Navy
programme.desc: Binghamton is offered a promotion and transfer up to Fleet HQ but must first reconcile a shortage in the bases equipment inventory After all is accounted for except for one item - A barrage balloon - McHale and The Crew must race against time in order to locate it and bring it in in time for Binghamton to be shipped out

programme.title: McHales Navy
programme.desc: A business venture - Involving the manufacture and sale of sarongs to the Base personnel - Has the guys divided into two separate quarreling groups When the feud escalates Binghamton tries to take advantage of its effect on them during a PT Crew efficiency test - Their failure of which would mean their being shipped out for re-assignment

programme.title: Gomer Pyle USMC
programme.desc: Gomer wins a trip for two to Las Vegas and takes Sergeant Carter with him The Sergeant has no money so he has to rely on Gomer for entertainment but Gomer has set an itinerary which include things like visiting a Rock Museum

programme.title: Gomer Pyle USMC
programme.desc: Opie Taylor runs away from Mayberry to join the Marines

programme.title: Gilligans Island
programme.desc: Gilligans Island

programme.title: Gilligans Island
programme.desc: Gilligans Island

programme.title: Real McCoys S04E35
programme.desc: Real McCoys S04E35

programme.title: Real McCoys S02E36
programme.desc: Real McCoys S02E36

programme.title: Get Smart
programme.desc: A British scientist is hiding at Maxs apartment

programme.title: Get Smart
programme.desc: Maxs archenemy Siegfried wants to defect

programme.title: BJ and the Bear
programme.desc: A team has made a super computer police car that can tell everything wrong with vehicles generating huge for police depts FBI etc They target and harass BJ McKay and others to put them out of business BJ and his friends decide to fight back against this car that seems to know their every step

programme.title: Mister Ed
programme.desc: Wilbur Post and his wife Carol move into their first house They find the previous tenants horse abandoned in the backyard barn Carol insists on selling the animal but Wilbur wants to keep it To his surprise the horse agrees with him

programme.title: Mister Ed
programme.desc: The Posts neighbor Roger catches Mister Ed and Wilbur talking to each other

programme.title: Death Race 2000
programme.desc: In a dystopian future a cross country automobile race requires contestants to run down innocent pedestrians to gain points that are tallied based on each kills brutality

programme.title: Revenge of the Dragon
programme.desc: Action star Ramon Zamora stars in this action packed golden oldie A cruel twist of fate turns a peaceful man into a one man death force as he embarks on a violent vengeance trial

programme.title: The Bullwinkle
programme.desc: The Bullwinkle

programme.title: Bullwinkle 530
programme.desc: Bullwinkle 530

programme.title: The Herculoids
programme.desc: The Herculoids

programme.title: The Herculoids
programme.desc: Bubblecrafts rise out of the waters Bubblemen are directed by Brotak to kidnap Zandor and TaraAndropon sends his robots to attack the Herculoids only to be defeated Zandor accepts his challenge as he sends his best warrior Ogron

programme.title: Inspector Gadget
programme.desc: Gadget Penny and Brain try to derail MADs plan to steal an entire train carrying sophisticated computers that will help their operation

programme.title: Inspector Gadget
programme.desc: Quimby sends Gadget to infiltrate MADs laboratory that is producing a sleeping gas so powerful that it will send everyone in the world to fall asleep

programme.title: A Bullet for Pretty Boy
programme.desc: After serving four years of a six-year sentence on a manslaughter charge a tough punk Pretty Boy Floyd escapes from prison and goes on a violent rampage

programme.title: Filler
programme.desc: Filler

programme.title: Filler
programme.desc: Filler

programme.title: Space 1999
programme.desc: After destroying an asteroid on a collision course with the moon an even larger obstacle appears - an entire planet! On a recon mission John Koenig encounters an inhabitant who convinces him- on the basis of faith- that the moon and the planet must collide But no one else supports Koenigs stand

programme.title: Arena
programme.desc: In a huge space arena fighters from all over the galaxy come to battle each other in hopes of claiming victory While most warriors are of various alien species Steve Armstrong Paul Satterfield is a rarity -- a human who aspires to compete in the games Training with his friend Shorty Hamilton Camp and encouraged by the lovely promoter Quinn Claudia Christian Steve has a shot at the intergalactic championship but plenty of extraterrestrial brawlers are eager to take him down

programme.title: The Dukes of Hazzard
programme.desc: When the Comfurt family suddenly strike it rich their car - containing their windfall in a safe locked inside the trunk - is stolen The Dukes track down the car as it changes into the hands of a ruthless bank robber

programme.title: Hercules 210
programme.desc: Hercules 210

programme.title: Earth Final Conflict
programme.desc: Sandoval is watching via nanobots inside Street as she tries to decipher Maels riddle She tries to figure out how to escape from Sandoval and the Taelons forcing her to solve the riddle She flashes back to childhood fears

programme.title: War of the Worlds
programme.desc: The aliens are forced to move their unborn infants to a refrigeration facility to save them Meanwhile Suzannes ex-husband an investigative journalist appears seeking to uncover the truth about the Blackwood project

programme.title: Swamp Thing
programme.desc: When Carla Jeffries uses Arcanes own scheming ways against him to take over his complex the doctor and Swamp Thing must work together to save both the swamp and Arcanes life

programme.title: Swamp Thing
programme.desc: When Arcane hires mercenaries to kill Swamp Thing the injured creature uses Anne Fisks equipment to try to heal himself temporarily becoming human again Tressa discovers his secret and tries to help him

programme.title: The Fugitive
programme.desc: Kimble and a beautiful trucking dispatcher fall in love but shes afraid to tell him about legal restrictions against her

programme.title: BIg Valley
programme.desc: A man arrives at the ranch looking for Heath and is shot by two trailing bounty hunters who claim he is wanted for murder While the man is recuperating at the ranch Jarrod travels to Coreyville to look into the murder charge and Heath comes to terms with an old grudge

programme.title: Cheyenne
programme.desc: In Mexico Cheyenne finds a wounded man he takes to a local village which has a female doctor He quickly learns the town is being held hostage by a vicious bandit who will burn the village if he doesnt find who shot two of his men

programme.title: Young 305
programme.desc: Young 305

programme.title: Lonesome Dove Outlaw Years
programme.desc: Lonesome Dove Outlaw Years

programme.title: The Streets of San Francisco
programme.desc: After being shot by robbers who were holding up a store a young police officer is treated by a doctor who was on the scene Unfortunately the officer later dies and the doctor becomes the only one who can identify the robbers But when Stone and Keller try to call him they find that he had to be using a phony name The man has been practicing using the name of several different doctors

programme.title: Mission Impossible
programme.desc: Jim Phelps is the new leader of the Impossible Missions Force with no explanation or even reference made about the departure of predecessor Dan Briggs First up for Phelps is a mission involving the drug trade Cresnik and Walters have cornered the heroin market and sell it at a handsome profit to gangs around the world Phelps devises an operation which will drive a wedge between the heroin dealers and their customers

programme.title: Dragnet
programme.desc: The police academy are accepting applications from people who want to join the police force Friday and Gannon help with the interview process

programme.title: Dragnet
programme.desc: Friday Gannon talk to community members to improve relations between police and public They suggest people call them to find the truth of incidents instead of spreading rumors A couple complains they were stopped because of their race

programme.title: The 3 Julias
programme.desc: Fish Day Pt5 Julia Child impersonator Pt 3 Trailer Trash Chocolate 3 Julias Julia Child Impersonator 3 Julias 30a Beer 3 Day Part 4 3 Julias 30a Beer Day Par"

programme.title: Night of the Demons
programme.desc: Night of the Demons is a 1988 American supernatural horror film directed by Kevin S Tenney written and produced by Joe Augustyn and starring Amelia Kinkade Cathy Podewell Linnea Quigley Hal Havins and Alvin Alexis

programme.title: The Hills have Eyes
programme.desc: On the way to California a family has the misfortune to have their car break down in an area closed to the public and inhabited by violent savages ready to attack

programme.title: Demons 2
programme.desc: Various residents of a high-rise apartment building are watching a film being broadcast on television The films story follows several teens who trespass into a city that was deserted and walled-off due to the Demon outbreak from the first film Finding the demons corpse one of the teens revives it accidentally when blood drips from a scratch into the demons mouth

programme.desc: Live from Hollywood, CA on January 24, 2019, Karate Combat: Hollywood kicks off Karate Combat's sophomore season. Held at the Avalon, the former Hollywood Palace building, near the famous intersection of Hollywood and Vine. Elhadji Ndour v. Calum Robb.

programme.desc: The Premier MMA promotion, Telecast live across the globe Showcasing some of the worlds best MMA athletes.

programme.title: Hard Knocks
programme.desc: Coming from a history of drinking heavily and drug abuse, Nick Burnham was able to turn his life around completely by prioritizing his MMA training. Now, at HK38, Nick is looking to take the Lightweight title away from Dauda Keita in a fight that goes the distance!

programme.title: Hard Knocks
programme.desc: Tim Baker v. Dan Cane

programme.title: Hard Knocks
programme.desc: Changing your lifestyle from one of jail and rebellion to one of discipline and MMA is not an easy task, but Todd Stoute is prrof that it is possible to make that switch. At HK38, he is up against Clay Davidson and is looking for the win.

programme.title: Dungeons Dragons
programme.desc: Venger enslaved a gnome village with a powerful spell Only a gnome wizard Lukian can break the spell but Venger had trapped Lukian in a most unusual prison

programme.title: Dungeons Dragons
programme.desc: Hank Sheila Presto Eric and Diana are captured by Venger and thrown into a volcanic prison Its up to Bobby to save them with some help from one of Vengers unwilling servants

programme.title: Inspector Gadget
programme.desc: Quimby believes that MAD is behind the theft of several military planes

programme.title: Inspector Gadget
programme.desc: Dr Stench an agent of MAD has invented a substance that makes gold smell terrible making it valueless Inspector Gadget guards the national gold reserve at Fort Bucks

programme.title: Challenge of the GoBots
programme.desc: The Renegades hold a towns children hostage to force the adults to build a giant Ultra Zod which will conquer Earth and then GoBotron

programme.title: Challenge of the GoBots
programme.desc: When a giant robot designed to protect humanity from the Renegades turns against its creators the Renegades are quick to take advantage of the situation

programme.title: The Herculoids
programme.desc: The Herculoids

programme.title: The Herculoids
programme.desc: Neron captures the Herculoids to fight gladiatorial battles in his arenaThe Temple of Trax seems to be abandoned In reality the high priest has a plan to kidnap Tara and sacrifice her for the return of Trax after 2000 years

programme.title: Jayce and The Wheeled Warriors
programme.desc: A tussle with a comet hurls the Pride and crew twenty-five years back in time to Jayces home planet They search and find Audric when he was a student Jayce tells him he is his son and after much hesitation Audric almost believes him

programme.title: Jayce and The Wheeled Warriors
programme.desc: Saw Boss and Monster Minds are blocking sunlight to a planet making it too cold for that planets defensive humruns large bugs to be capable of fighting and eating the Monster Mind vines Jayce and Oon are imprisoned by the native people

programme.title: MASK
programme.desc: Two boys find a mock-up of a Space Shuttle in the Everglades VENOM is after the actual thing Alex Sector takes over as MASK leader after Matt Trakker is bitten by a snake

programme.title: Captain N The Game Master
programme.desc: Kevin Keene and his dog Duke have been transported to Video Land and asked to help defeat Mother Brain After Princess Lana is kidnapped Kevin and his video game companions Mega-Man Kid Icarus and Simon Belmont have to work together to save her or else Mother Brain just might be able to take over Video Land and rule forever

programme.title: Captain N The Game Master
programme.desc: Mother Brain makes a discovery that Kevin isnt very good at the Bayou Billy video game So she sets a trap to lure him into Bayouland
